pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script explicitly sets PROJECT_DIR to this path
export_result.sh explicitly checks for this image name during verification
setup_task.sh starts the Python HTTP artifact server on port 8090
export_result.sh verifies the artifact's existence at this exact path within the built image
setup_task.sh writes the generated token to auth_token.txt in the project directory

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on completely synthetic data generated during setup. The working directory is /home/ga/secure-build, and the agent must build an image named secure-app:latest. A local Python HTTP server is started on port 8090 serving a synthetic proprietary library, requiring authentication with a token generated and placed in auth_token.txt. The final image is evaluated to ensure the artifact is located at /app/proprietary_lib.tar.gz and that the token is not leaked in the image environment or history.
